description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a wooden privacy fence, featuring a spacious outdoor deck area with various amenities. The structure is primarily rectangular with a flat roof and large glass sliding doors that open to the patio. The outdoor space includes a swimming pool, a hot tub, a shaded dining area, and several lounge zones, all set on a wooden deck with potted plants and greenery. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or stone-like material, complemented by large windows and glass doors for ample natural light. The property is designed for both comfort and outdoor living, with clear zones for relaxation, dining, and recreation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, and a spacious fenced deck featuring a pool, hot tub, and outdoor lounge areas.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large glass doors, and the pool and hot tub area on the right side of the deck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the open-plan living area, sliding glass doors, and the outdoor dining and lounge spaces on the left.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the pool, shaded dining area, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the driveway gate, additional outdoor seating, and the overall fenced perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped glass doors and windows
